releaseNotes: • Fixed first-time setup failing to receive larger settings backups over Wi-Fi/QR: uploads up to ~32 MB now work (previously a backup over 5 MB was rejected mid-upload and showed on your phone/PC as a "network disconnect"). First-run setup also now keeps a diagnostic log even on a brand-new install (where debug logging is off by default), so any import problem can be captured and reported.
